raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I made 3 Airline Reservations for a flight on XX/XX/XXXX. However, the Airline ( XXXX ) cancelled the flight and refunded all charges except one {$66.00} charge. ( There were XXXX {$1600.00} charges, XXXX {$1900.00} charge, XXXX {$75.00} charges, XXXX {$44.00} charge and XXXX {$66.00}, - charges. I called XXXX numerous times and asked them why they refunded only 2 of the XXXX {$66.00}, - charges. The answer was that they would correct their mistake and also refund the XXXX {$66.00}, - charge. This never happened even after the case was escalated. Finally I decided to file a credit card dispute with Barclays on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, Barclays replied and advised me that the transaction was referred to a dispute specialist. However, the dispute specialist decided that I filed the dispute after the 120 day deadline and that Barclays couldnt do anything about it. The Merchant ( XXXX ) was never contacted and a response from them was never obtained. 
However, it appears that a 540 day deadline should have been applied since the charge was travel related and the service was never received. It also appears that this was an international charge which has a different deadline. When I contacted XXXX again in XX/XX/XXXX I was told that the {$66.00}, - were refunded on XX/XX/XXXX which isnt true. XXXX stopped to communicate with me when I told them that the XXXX {$66.00} charge was never refunded. When I called Barclays on XX/XX/XXXX they confirmed that there was no refund on or around XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX.
